title: Chovy's Apocalypse
description: Adds apocalyptic items, blocks, structures and weapons
body:
This Mod Turns minecraft into a Apocalypse

![Image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ff7023036a97c0e63f9702f610119d7f223d588.png)

This Mod adds Apocalypse items, blocks, foods, melee weapons to Minecraft-Forge

In this mod:

Melee weapons like Fire Axe, Baseball Bat, Machete etc.
Canned Foods and Energy Drink
Bandage and Lockpick
Decorative Blocks

![Crates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/181941ec89204f4304a52b83b79d3205829a3f73.png)

Crates drop random items according to their type, that helps you to survive
Also crates can be found in random structures

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f685d62d8e2ef0088bbe3ee49a7089feda55de8.png)

-Canned Foods can keep you fuller
-Bandages heal you
-Energy Drink gives you SPEED effect for 20 seconds
-Weapons help you defend yourself against zombies or players

![Lockpick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ae157b84fcd13160dcf50b98c2894703467573c.png)

Lockpick helps you open iron doors and trapdoors

![1.7 features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a41df6a6a0535eb3c735913d7f4950f7f58d144_0.webp)

In 1.7 version of our mod we added
 -Added new foods
 -Added new language (Turkish)
 -Log Cabin structure added
 -Chocolate Item retextured

More content will be added to this mode. With the feedback and help of our community, we will try to make the best outbreak mod in the mod world. Please give your feedback in the comments to support us. If you have any bugs, shortcomings or wishes, please contact us in the comments.

Support Mail: anchovystudiosmc@gmail.com
